2606.11087.title: Test-Time Gradient Guidance of Flow Policies in Reinforcement Learning
2606.11087.paper_summary: Expressive continuous control policies, such as diffusion and flow models, form the backbone of recent advances in scaling imitation learning for simulated and real robot control. While they are known to scale stably in the supervised imitation learning setting, incorporating them into reinforcement learning (RL) pipelines for policy improvement has proven more difficult. It often requires specialized training objectives or backpropagating through denoising processes, which cause well-known issues with stability and affect scalability. In this paper we study the question of whether simple policy improvement schemes at test time alone, leaving stable supervised policy training intact, can be a competitive alternative which sidesteps these issues. To this end, we propose QGF (Q-Guided Flow), an RL algorithm that performs policy optimization entirely at test time. QGF works by pre-training both a reference flow policy (via a standard behavioral cloning objective) and a value function critic and, at test time, using the value gradient to guide the reference policy to generate higher-value actions without any additional policy learning. Empirically, QGF outperforms prior test-time RL methods on single-task and goal-conditioned offline RL benchmarks with high-dimensional action spaces, and is competitive with state-of-the-art training-time algorithms while being much cheaper to run. Moreover, it exhibits favorable scaling with model size by avoiding the instability of actor-critic training, offering a practical and effective alternative RL algorithm with expressive policies.
2606.11087.paper_summary_zh: 表現性連續控制策略，如擴散和流模型，構成了最近在模擬和真實機器人控制中擴展模仿學習的進展的基礎。雖然它們在監督模仿學習環境中被認為能穩定擴展，但將它們納入強化學習（RL）管道以進行策略改進卻證明更為困難。這通常需要專門的訓練目標或通過去噪過程進行反向傳播，這會引起眾所周知的穩定性問題並影響擴展性。在本文中，我們研究了在測試時僅使用簡單的策略改進方案，保持穩定的監督策略訓練不變，是否可以成為一種競爭性的替代方案，避開這些問題。為此，我們提出了QGF（Q引導流），這是一種在測試時完全進行策略優化的RL算法。QGF通過預訓練參考流策略（通過標準行為克隆目標）和價值函數評論者來運作，在測試時使用價值梯度引導參考策略生成更高價值的行動，而不進行任何額外的策略學習。實證結果表明，QGF在單任務和目標條件的離線RL基準測試中，對於高維動作空間的表現超過了先前的測試時RL方法，並且在運行成本上遠低於最先進的訓練時算法。此外，它通過避免演員-評論者訓練的不穩定性，展現了隨模型大小的有利擴展，提供了一種實用且有效的替代RL算法，具有表現性策略。
2606.11087.author: Zhiyuan Zhou et.al.
2606.11087.authors: Zhiyuan Zhou, Andy Peng, Charles Xu, Qiyang Li, Tobias Springenberg, Kevin Frans, Sergey Levine
